allow: Bash(node -e "const { chromium } = require\('playwright'\); \(async \(\) => { const b = await chromium.launch\({args:['--no-sandbox']}\); const p = await b.newPage\(\); await p.goto\('http://localhost:3000'\); await p.waitForSelector\('h1'\); await p.screenshot\({path:'/tmp/disney-app.png', fullPage: false}\); await b.close\(\); console.log\('done'\); }\)\(\)")
